name: StoreSight AI Keep-Alive Service
description: External monitoring to keep Render backend awake for evaluation

services.name: UptimeRobot
services.setup:
1. Create free account at uptimerobot.com
2. Add new monitor
3. Set URL to https://ecommerce-rag.onrender.com/api/health
4. Set interval to 5 minutes
5. Save and activate

services.name: Pingdom
services.setup:
1. Create free account at pingdom.com
2. Add new uptime check
3. Set URL to https://ecommerce-rag.onrender.com/api/health
4. Set check interval to 10 minutes
5. Save and activate

services.name: StatusCake
services.setup:
1. Create free account at statuscake.com
2. Add new monitor
3. Set URL to https://ecommerce-rag.onrender.com/api/health
4. Set check interval to 5 minutes
5. Save and activate

recommendation: Use UptimeRobot - it's free, reliable, and easy to set up
alternatives: Run keep_alive.py script locally on your computer
